repo_local_scan.command: rg -n "\\b(hkdata|hk_data_platform|rqdata-hk|rqdata-tick|alloc-hk|freeze-hk|hydrate-hk|longport)\\b" README.md docs scripts tests market-data-platform cross-sectional-trees quant-execution-engine --glob '!**/.git/**' --glob '!**/__pycache__/**' --glob '!**/.pytest_cache/**'
known_consumers: market-data-platform deprecated hkdata and rqdata-hk compatibility entrypoints
market-data-platform freeze-hk and hydrate-hk restore control plane
cross-sectional-trees deprecated cstree alloc-hk compatibility command
quant-execution-engine LongPort broker runtime and shared multi-market execution support
top-level doctor, lifecycle docs, archive docs, and release checklist

downstream_owner_attestations.notes: Repo-local scan is recorded. External callers and operator-owned automation still require attestation before any compatibility surface can enter removal review.

removal_review.reason: Known compatibility consumers remain and downstream owner attestations are not complete.
